title: Peanut Butter-Chocolate No-Bake Cookies
description: Classic no-bake cookies made on the stovetop with cocoa, peanut butter, and rolled oats.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with wax paper or parchment.

Bring the sugar, milk, butter, and cocoa to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, then let boil for 1 minute. Remove from the heat. Add the oats, peanut butter, vanilla, and salt, and stir to combine.
Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet, and let sit at room temperature until cooled and hardened, about 30 minutes. Refrigerate in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
